name: Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup berries such as strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, and blackberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together sugar and flour three times.
3. Add egg whites to a mixing bowl with cream of tartar and salt. Beat until very soft peaks form.
4. Gradually whisk in the sugar/flour mixture on low speed.
5. Fold in vanilla, almond extract, and lemon juice.
6. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan and smooth the top.
7. Use a spatula to gently remove air pockets from the batter.
8. Bake until pale brown, about 1 hour and 10 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and turn upside down to cool for 1 hour.
10. Serve with whipped cream and berries, if desired.
